title: 神奇的韩元KRW和泡菜溢价 | 原文
content: South Korea's 2026 market presents a paradox: the KOSPI index doubled, with Samsung Electronics up 185% and SK Hynix up 284%, driven by AI and semiconductor demand, yet the won fell to 1,560 per dollar—a level unseen since the 2009 financial crisis. Despite record exports and a $27 billion May trade surplus, the currency weakened dramatically, contradicting textbook economics where strong trade performance typically strengthens a currency.

title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
content: AI-era Berkshire is a Python-based value investing research framework built on Claude Code. It integrates methodologies from four investment masters: Warren Buffett, Charlie Munger, Duan Yongping, and Li Lu. The project employs multi-agent parallel research and adversarial analysis to evaluate investment opportunities. It has 1,489 stars and 263 forks on GitHub.

content: TREK is a self-hosted travel and trip planning application built in TypeScript. It features real-time collaboration, interactive maps, progressive web app support, single sign-on, budget tracking, and packing lists. The open-source project has 6,132 stars and 587 forks.

title: Marc Andreessen on AI, Technology, and the Future of Humanity
content: Marc Andreessen discusses AI, technology, and human progress with Michael Malice. Drawing on decades of tech experience, he argues that common fears about technology stem from misunderstanding innovation. Andreessen explains how large language models differ from earlier AI visions, and why he believes AI will expand rather than replace human capability. The conversation covers automation, productivity, cybersecurity, economic growth, creativity, and historical patterns of technological disruption.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Marc Andreessen, Michael Malice)

normalizedTitle: marc andreessen on ai technology and the future of humanity

title: 使用 kkRepo 搭建 Maven 私服
content: kkRepo is an open-source, self-hosted artifact repository supporting Maven, npm, PyPI, Go, Helm, and Docker/OCI formats. To set up a Maven private server, run the quickstart script to launch kkRepo with MySQL. Create three repository types: hosted repositories for releases and snapshots, a proxy for Maven Central, and a group combining all three. Clients pull dependencies through the single group URL, while publishes go to the appropriate hosted repository.

title: 豆包正式上线三档付费订阅服务：最高 500 元 / 月，接入 2.1 系列大模型
content: Doubao launched a Pro version powered by its 2.1 series large language models, featuring an office task mode with Agent capabilities including computer control, browser use, skills, and scheduled tasks, plus built-in Office suite and media creation tools. Three subscription tiers are offered: Standard at 68 yuan/month, Premium at 200 yuan/month (4x quotas), and Advanced at 500 yuan/month (10x quotas). Free tier users continue receiving new models.

title: 消息称苹果将于 7 月下旬量产首款可折叠 iPhone
content: Apple will begin mass production of its first foldable iPhone in late July, according to supply chain sources. The company has finalized key specifications including the display, casing, and mechanical components, and has entered the production preparation stage. Despite recent rumors about hinge-related delays, Apple still plans to release the device in September as originally scheduled.

title: 谷歌将 Gemini 3.5 Pro 发布日期推后至 7 月份
content: Google has delayed the release of Gemini 3.5 Pro from June to July to gather more feedback from early testers and refine the model. Alphabet's stock fell 0.8% following the news. The company had previously announced the model at its I/O conference in May, where it also launched the Gemini 3.5 series and reported nearly 900 million monthly active Gemini users.
